pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4 as the parent POM to manage dependencies and build configuration for the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 requires Java 21; using an older parent or no parent would result in incompatibility with the target JDK and missing managed dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21 to ensure compilation for the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without setting java.version to 21, the compiler defaults to an older version (e.g., 1.8 or 11), causing compilation failures for Java 21 features or incompatibility with Spring Boot 4.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the specified Java version for source and target compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit compiler configuration, the build might not respect the java.version property or might use an outdated plugin version incompatible with Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Include the new 'mongodriver' module in the multi-module build.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch parent POM from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom project parent to centralize dependency management.
Rename artifactId to match the directory name and project identity.
Update project name to be more descriptive.
Remove explicit Java version property as it is likely managed by the new parent or defaults.
Add docker-maven-plugin version property for consistent versioning.
Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency for production-ready features.
Add Docker Maven plugin configuration within a profile to build Docker images.

spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) API.
spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or compile if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3/4.
springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with modern Spring Boot.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.general_idea: Migrate JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.
springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 4 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing compilation errors due to missing imports.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Migrate test runner from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 Jupiter.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner classes are not part of the JUnit 5 API; tests will fail to execute or compile if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.
JUnit 5 does not recognize JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations; setup methods will not run.
JUnit 5 does not recognize JUnit 4 @Test annotation; test methods will not be discovered.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Spring Data PageRequest API usage to static factory method.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: The constructor PageRequest(int, int) is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Data versions in favor of PageRequest.of().

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Spring Data Sort API usage to static factory methods.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: The constructor Sort(Order...) is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Data versions in favor of Sort.by() and Sort.Order.asc/desc().

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Spring Data Sort API usage for multi-criteria sorting.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: The constructor Sort(Order...) is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Data versions in favor of Sort.by() and Sort.Order.asc/desc().
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.before: new Sort( new Sort.Order(Sort.Direction.ASC, "id"), new Sort.Order(Sort.Direction.DESC, "fullName") )

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Hamcrest assertion import to explicit static import.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: Static imports from org.junit.Assert.assertThat are often removed in JUnit 5 migrations in favor of explicit Hamcrest imports to avoid ambiguity.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Modernize code formatting and variable declarations.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data Neo4j OGM annotations with the new Spring Data Neo4j 6+ schema annotations.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: The old annotations (org.neo4j.ogm.annotation.*) are removed in Spring Data Neo4j 6+, causing compilation errors if not replaced.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace @NodeEntity annotation with @Node to mark the class as a Neo4j node entity.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: @NodeEntity is removed in Spring Data Neo4j 6+, causing compilation errors.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace @GraphId with @Id and @GeneratedValue for the identifier field.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: @GraphId is removed in Spring Data Neo4j 6+, causing compilation errors.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Remove @Index annotation from the login field as indexing is now configured differently or removed.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: @Index from the OGM package is removed in Spring Data Neo4j 6+, causing compilation errors.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Update @Relationship annotation to use uppercase type string and add private modifier.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: While the annotation class name is the same, the package changed (handled in imports), and this ensures compatibility with the new schema mapping conventions.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Add diamond operator to HashSet instantiation for modern Java syntax.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line format for brevity.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.after:
public String getLogin() { return login; }
public void setLogin(String login) { this.login = login; }

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replace deprecated GraphRepository with Neo4jRepository to align with Spring Data Neo4j 6+ API.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: GraphRepository interface was removed in Spring Data Neo4j 6, causing a compile error.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.before:
import org.springframework.data.neo4j.repository.GraphRepository;
public interface UserRepository extends GraphRepository<User>
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.after:
import org.springframework.data.neo4j.repository.Neo4jRepository;
public interface UserRepository extends Neo4jRepository<User, Long>

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update import path for the @Query annotation to the new package location in Spring Data Neo4j 6.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: The old package org.springframework.data.neo4j.annotation.Query no longer exists, causing a compile error.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Modernize Cypher query syntax from legacy START/MATCH to modern MATCH pattern matching.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Legacy START clause is deprecated and may be removed in future Neo4j versions; modern syntax is preferred for compatibility and performance.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate static imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 API.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is not available in JUnit 5; tests fail to compile without JUnit 5 assertions.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.before:
import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertNotNull;

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate lifecycle annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: org.junit.Before/After are not recognized by JUnit 5 engine; tests fail to execute or compile.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate test runner configuration from JUnit 4 @RunWith to JUnit 5 @ExtendWith.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: @RunWith is ignored in JUnit 5; Spring context fails to load without proper extension.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate ignored test annotation from JUnit 4 @Ignore to JUnit 5 @Disabled.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: @Ignore is not recognized by JUnit 5 engine; test may run unexpectedly or fail to compile.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update Spring Data Neo4j template API from Neo4jOperations to Neo4jClient.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Neo4jOperations is removed in newer Spring Data Neo4j versions; code fails to compile.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update Cypher query syntax for index creation to match Neo4j 4.x+ standards.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Old CREATE INDEX syntax is deprecated/removed in Neo4j 4.x; query fails at runtime.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.before: template.query("CREATE INDEX ON :User(login)", new HashMap<String, Object>() );
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.after: neo4jClient.query("CREATE INDEX user_login IF NOT EXISTS FOR (u:User) ON (u.login)").run();

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Update repository method from deprecated findOne to findById returning Optional.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: findOne is removed in Spring Data 2.x+; code fails to compile.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Change rootId field type from primitive long to wrapper Long to support nullability.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Primitive long cannot hold null; if ID is not set, default 0 causes logic errors or NPEs in some contexts.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Remove unused import for UserRepository (if no longer directly referenced in a way that requires it, or just cleanup).

Remove unused import for SpringExtension (if not used, but here it IS used in @ExtendWith, so this is actually a KEEP. Wait, looking at diff: +import org.springframework.test.context.junit.jupiter.SpringExtension; is ADDED. So no removal here. The removal is of SpringJUnit4ClassRunner. I already listed that. Let's check if SpringExtension is removed? No, it's added. So no removal intent for SpringExtension.)
Remove debug print statement and helper method.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.before:
out("Root id: " + rootId);
... private static void out(Object o) { System.out.println(o); }

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Clean up comments and formatting in test methods.
Migrate from Spring Data Neo4j OGM (Object-Graph Mapping) to the native Bolt driver approach.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: The OGM-based configuration classes (Neo4jConfiguration, SessionFactory, InProcessServer) are removed or incompatible with the new Spring Data Neo4j version which requires AbstractNeo4jConfig and a Driver bean.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Migrate static assertion imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is not available in JUnit 5; code fails to compile without the new import.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.before:
import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertNotNull;

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.why_exists: org.junit.Before and org.junit.Test are not recognized by JUnit 5 engine; tests fail to execute or compile.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring integration.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.why_exists: @RunWith is ignored by JUnit 5; Spring context fails to load without @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class).

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Adjust argument order in assertEquals and assertNotNull to match JUnit 5 API signature.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.why_exists: JUnit 5 Assertions.assertEquals expects (expected, actual, message) whereas JUnit 4 used (message, expected, actual); mismatch causes compile error.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.before:
assertNotNull("Value is <null>", value);
assertEquals( "Value mismatch" , "bar", value);

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Migrate test assertions from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 API.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Assert) are not available or compatible with JUnit 5 test runners; compilation fails if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.before:
import static org.junit.Assert.assertEquals;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertNotNull;

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Migrate test lifecycle annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @Test from org.junit) are ignored by JUnit 5 engine; tests will not execute or compile if JUnit 4 is removed.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner with JUnit 5 extension for Spring integration.
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 / Spring Framework 6 requires JUnit 5 extensions; @RunWith(SpringJUnit4ClassRunner) is incompatible and causes runtime failure or compilation error.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Update assertEquals argument order to match JUnit 5 signature (expected, actual, message).
springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.why_exists: JUnit 5 Assertions.assertEquals expects (expected, actual, message) or (expected, actual). The old JUnit 4 order (message, expected, actual) or (message, actual, expected) causes compilation errors or incorrect assertion logic.
